member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Propagates notification that the request has been cancelled.
member.response: Returns the full list of products.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single product by ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the product.
Propagates notification that the request has been cancelled.
member.returns: The product with the specified ID.
member.response: The supplied ID is not a positive integer.
No product found with the given ID.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Create(ProductManagementAPI.Models.Product,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: Propagates notification that the request has been cancelled.
member.returns: The newly created product with its assigned ID.
member.response: The request body failed model validation.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Update(System.Int32,ProductManagementAPI.Models.Product,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The unique identifier of the product to update.
Propagates notification that the request has been cancelled.
member.response: The supplied ID is invalid or the request body failed model validation.
No product found with the given ID.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The unique identifier of the product to delete.
Propagates notification that the request has been cancelled.
member.response: The supplied ID is not a positive integer.
No product found with the given ID.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Controllers.ProductsController.Search(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The category name to filter by. Case-sensitive.
Propagates notification that the request has been cancelled.
member.returns: A list of products whose category exactly matches the supplied value. Returns an empty list when no products match — not a 404.
member.response: Returns the matching products (may be an empty list).
The category query parameter is missing or empty.

member.name: T:ProductManagementAPI.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Catches any unhandled exceptions in the request pipeline, logs them, and returns a consistent 500 JSON response.

member.name: T:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Standard response envelope returned by all API endpoints.
member.typeparam: The type of the response payload.

member.name: P:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the request was processed successfully.

member.name: P:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1.Data
member.summary: The response payload. null when the request failed.

member.name: P:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1.Message
member.summary: A human-readable message describing the outcome.

member.name: P:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1.Errors
member.summary: Validation or processing error messages. Empty on success.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1.SuccessResult(`0,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a successful response wrapping the given data.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1.FailResult(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failure response with a single error message.

member.name: M:ProductManagementAPI.Models.ApiResponse`1.FailResult(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a failure response with multiple error messages.
